open_alex.label: OpenAlex
open_alex.description: Academic works by topic and keyword, ranked by citation count

internet_archive.label: Internet Archive
internet_archive.description: Full-text books and primary sources, especially pre-1928 public domain
internet_archive.query: subject:("Roman Republic" OR "Roman Republic") AND mediatype:texts

worldcat.label: WorldCat
worldcat.description: Global library holdings by LCSH subject heading

perseus_digital_library.label: Perseus Digital Library
perseus_digital_library.description: Classical primary sources with full text, morphological tools, and translations

jstor.label: JSTOR
jstor.description: Academic journal articles, especially humanities and classics

google_books.label: Google Books
google_books.description: Book metadata and previews, searchable by LCSH subject

hathi_trust.label: HathiTrust
hathi_trust.description: Digitized library collections, full text for public domain works

open_library.label: Open Library
open_library.description: Open-access book metadata and lending, Internet Archive integration

open_syllabus.label: Open Syllabus
open_syllabus.description: Most-assigned academic texts by field, indicates canonical teaching corpus

wikidata_p921.label: Wikidata (main subject reverse)
wikidata_p921.description: Scholarly works in Wikidata whose P921 (main subject) = seed or discipline QID

loc.label: Library of Congress
loc.description: Authority records, subject heading hierarchy, narrower/broader terms

fast.label: FAST (OCLC)
fast.description: Faceted subject headings derived from LCSH, optimized for machine use

viaf.label: VIAF
viaf.description: Virtual authority file linking national libraries, resolves name variants

gnd.label: GND (German National Library)
gnd.description: German authority file with rich subject relationships and classifications

_meta.rule: Never pass PID or QID without label
